description: The line chart falsely implies a continuous trend or progression between monthly order counts, suggesting that the values smoothly transition from one month to the next as if following an underlying trend. While months do have a temporal order, using a line chart here visually overemphasizes the idea of a smooth, connected trajectory rather than showing each month as a discrete aggregate. This can mislead readers into thinking the dips and rises represent a meaningful continuous trend rather than independent monthly totals.
